founder.description: Founder La Thien Phi brings nearly two decades of architecture and interior design experience into residential, office and commercial projects.
founder.quote: Every project needs its own balance: the owner's way of living, the function of the space and the discipline to build it properly.
founder.title: A senior design direction, not just decorative styling

reviews.description: Short trust signals based on the kind of outcomes clients look for in design and construction work.

items.name: Villa owner
items.quote: The team helped us turn broad preferences into a clear design direction and practical material choices.

items.name: Apartment client
items.quote: Storage, lighting and daily flow were handled carefully, not just the visual style.

items.name: Business client
items.quote: The finished space felt consistent with the original concept and suitable for meeting customers.

reviews.title: What clients usually need from AA Design

faq.description: These answers help you decide whether to start with consultation, concept design or construction coordination.

items.answer: A simple concept can move faster, while villas and full-service projects need more time for layout, 3D, material and technical coordination. AA Design will estimate timing after reviewing the scope.
items.question: How long does design take?

items.answer: Design cost depends on project type, area, detail level and whether you need concept only or a full technical package.
items.question: How is design cost calculated?

items.answer: Yes. AA Design can review an existing design package and propose construction coordination, material control or detail refinement.
items.question: Can AA Design build from an existing design?

items.answer: Yes. Renovation projects are suitable when the current space has functional problems, outdated finishes or needs a stronger visual direction.
items.question: Do you accept renovation projects?

items.answer: Warranty scope depends on construction items and materials. It should be clarified with the final contract and handover checklist.
items.question: Is there warranty after handover?

faq.title: Questions before starting a project

carousel.heroTitle: Luxury interior design and turnkey construction

designService.description:
We provide a complete interior and exterior design package, from concept development and 3D visualization to selecting refined decorative details that make every space feel complete.
With dedication and precision, we create elegant and distinctive spaces for villas, private apartments, restaurants, hotels and professional offices. Every project balances creativity, function and the client's individual style.
designService.subtitle:
Comprehensive Design Solutions
Shaping Spaces, Realizing Ideas
designService.title: What we offer

ourProject.description: A selection of completed projects across different locations, purposes and client needs.
ourProject.title: Projects

ourService.description: Professional solutions - Fast execution - Refined completion in every detail

ourService.title: Our Services

profile.imageAlt: Interior space directed by AA Design

introduction.paragraph1: With nearly 20 years of experience in architecture and interior design, I have had the opportunity to work on a wide range of projects, from apartments and villas to offices and commercial spaces.
introduction.paragraph2: Every project has its own story, and I believe design is not only about arranging interiors but also about shaping ideal spaces for living and working.
introduction.title: Introduction

detail.description: Care for every detail, from spatial planning and material selection to lighting and color.
detail.title: Detail

harmony.description: Create a balanced relationship between function, aesthetics and the emotions of the people who use the space.
harmony.title: Harmony

practical.description: Design should be beautiful while bringing comfort, convenience and optimized function.
practical.title: Practicality

profile.quote: Every project is its own story, where function, aesthetics and emotion meet.
